name: rna_sc_programs
description: scRNA-seq gene programs from external factorization loadings (generic/cNMF/scHPF) to grouped gene sets

inputs.name: program_loadings_tsv
inputs.description: Generic program loadings table (wide or tidy long); required if cNMF/scHPF convenience inputs are not used

inputs.name: cnmf_gene_spectra_tsv
inputs.description: cNMF gene spectra table (TPM or score) convenience input

inputs.name: schpf_gene_scores_tsv
inputs.description: scHPF gene score table convenience input

parameters.name: gene_id_column
parameters.help: Gene column for tidy or wide formats

parameters.name: program_id_column
parameters.help: Program/factor column for tidy or wide formats

parameters.name: loading_column
parameters.help: Loading value column for long_tidy format

parameters.name: signature_name
parameters.help: Signature label; default resolves to input filename stem

parameters.name: program_id_prefix
parameters.help: Optional prefix prepended to program IDs

parameters.name: exclude_gene_regex
parameters.help: Repeatable regexes to exclude genes by symbol

parameters.name: gtf_gene_id_field
parameters.help: GTF attribute to use as gene_id

parameters.name: score_transform
parameters.help: Transform applied to raw program loadings

parameters.name: emit_gmt
parameters.help: Write per-program genesets.gmt and combined root genesets.gmt

parameters.name: gmt_require_symbol
parameters.help: Drop rows without usable symbols for GMT

parameters.name: gmt_split_signed
parameters.help: Emit __pos and __neg sets for signed loadings

outputs.name: program=<PROGRAM>/geneset.full.tsv
outputs.description: Full transformed loading table per factor (optional)

outputs.name: genesets.gmt
outputs.description: Combined GMT across all emitted factors (optional)
